figure.title: Accelerator Switched Topology (Base)
figure.purpose: Shows the base physical connectivity of four accelerators through two switches, without the key assignment overlays.

technical_summary: Shows four Accelerators (0, 1, 2, 3), each with Port 0 and Port 1.
Port 0 of each accelerator connects to Switch 0.
Port 1 of each accelerator connects to Switch 1.
Provides a clear view of the redundant, dual-switch fabric topology.

critical_facts: The architecture uses a dual-plane switched topology where Port 0 and Port 1 of all accelerators connect to separate, independent switches for redundancy and bandwidth.
